meta.title: Send Packages from Canada to Cuba
meta.description: Fast, reliable and affordable parcel shipping from Canada to all Cuban provinces. Weekly flights. Real-time tracking.

hero.headline: Send love from Canada to Cuba
hero.subtitle: Fast, reliable, and affordable parcel shipping from Canada to all Cuban provinces. Trusted by families since 2020.

cuba_banner.title: Delivering love across all of Cuba
cuba_banner.subtitle: From La Habana to Guantánamo — we cover every province.

features.label: Why choose us
features.title: Everything your family needs
features.subtitle: We make shipping to Cuba simple, safe, and affordable — from any province in Canada.

cards.title: Safe & Secure
cards.desc: Every package is handled with care and fully tracked from pickup to delivery.

cards.title: Real-time Tracking
cards.desc: Follow your shipment every step of the way through our client portal.

cards.title: All Canadian Provinces
cards.desc: We pick up from Ontario, Quebec, BC, Alberta and more.

cards.title: Affordable Rates
cards.desc: Competitive pricing with no hidden fees. Get your quote in seconds.

cards.title: Air Freight
cards.desc: Fast delivery in 7–20 business days via weekly flights.

cards.title: 24/7 Support
cards.desc: Our team is always available via WhatsApp, phone or email.

how_it_works.label: Process
how_it_works.title: Ship in 3 simple steps
how_it_works.subtitle: Getting your package to Cuba has never been easier.

steps.title: Get a Quote
steps.desc: Enter your package details and destination. Get an instant price estimate — no registration needed.

steps.title: Drop Off or Schedule Pickup
steps.desc: Bring your package to our Toronto or Montreal location, or schedule a pickup at your door.

steps.title: Delivered in Cuba
steps.desc: Your package is delivered to your family's door. Track every step through our client portal.

provinces.label: Coverage
provinces.title: All 16 Cuban provinces
provinces.subtitle: We deliver everywhere in Cuba. Select your destination to see the rate.

quote_cta.label: Get started
quote_cta.title: Ready to send your package?
quote_cta.subtitle: Get an instant quote — no registration required.

items.a: Delivery typically takes 7–20 business days depending on the destination province and flight availability. We operate weekly flights to Cuba.
You can send miscellaneous goods, clothing, food, medicine, electronics, and more. Some items are restricted by Cuban customs regulations.
The maximum weight per package is 50kg for miscellaneous items. For generators and batteries, please contact us for specific limits.

items.q: How is the shipping cost calculated?
items.a: Cost is calculated based on the greater of actual weight or volumetric weight, multiplied by the rate for your destination province.
Yes! Once your package is processed, you'll receive a tracking code to follow your shipment through our client portal.

items.q: Do you pick up from my home?
items.a: Yes, we offer pickup service. Contact us via WhatsApp or phone to schedule a pickup at your location.

footer.tagline: Reliable parcel shipping from Canada to Cuba. Trusted by families since 2020.
